bugs.title: Stonecutter chiseledBuild fails to switch between MC versions
bugs.evidence: java.lang.Exception: Failed to switch from 1.21.4 to 1.21.1 (and similar for 1.20.1). Direct :sub:build commands succeed structurally but show NO-SOURCE on every Kotlin task because the chiseledBuild mechanism that distributes processed source to sibling subprojects is broken.
bugs.expected: chiseledBuild produces 5 jars; sibling subprojects compile the shared src/main/kotlin/ tree with //? directives applied
bugs.suggested_fix: Investigate Stonecutter 0.6's kotlinController=true behavior with our //? directive placement. Possible workarounds: (a) try Stonecutter 0.7+, (b) simplify //? blocks to avoid nested imports inside /* */, (c) fall back to git-branches-per-version per the design doc Section 7.

bugs.title: MC 26.1.2 requires Java 25 but build JDK is 21
bugs.evidence: IllegalStateException: Minecraft 26.1.2 requires Java 25 but Gradle is using 21
bugs.expected: 26.1.2 subproject builds on the system's installed JDK
bugs.suggested_fix: Install JDK 25 on the build machine; set versions/26.1.2/gradle.properties java_release=25; verify Kotlin 2.3.21 supports jvmTarget=25. Defer to Phase 2a-2 if JDK 25 not available.

bugs.title: Fabric Loom 1.10-SNAPSHOT does not support MC 1.21.11 unpick format
bugs.suggested_fix: Bump Loom to 1.11-SNAPSHOT (or newer) globally, or use a Stonecutter directive on the Loom plugin version for MC >= 1.21.11. Verify all 5 versions' compatibility with chosen Loom release.

bugs.title: Two MC versions removed from settings.gradle.kts to allow other versions to configure
bugs.evidence: versions("1.20.1", "1.21.1", "1.21.4") — 26.1.2 and 1.21.11 omitted; gradle configures all subprojects upfront so one bad subproject blocks every task
bugs.expected: All 5 versions declared per design spec
bugs.suggested_fix: Re-add 26.1.2 and 1.21.11 after their respective blockers (bugs 2 and 3) are resolved.

bugs.title: Plan-specified FLK version for 1.20.1 (1.10.20+kotlin.2.0.21) does not exist on Maven
bugs.evidence: Maven 404. The 1.10.x FLK line ships only with Kotlin 1.9.x bundled stdlib; 2.0+ requires FLK 1.11.x or 1.13.x which don't support MC 1.20.1.
bugs.suggested_fix: Corrected to 1.10.20+kotlin.1.9.24 inline (latest published 1.10.x). Note: this Kotlin 1.9.24 FLK stdlib may conflict at runtime with the Kotlin 2.3.21 stdlib our Kotlin compiler bundles. Validate at runtime before declaring 1.20.1 fully supported.

orchestrator_note: Wave 11 final verification revealed that Phase 2a's multi-version expansion is deeper than the design anticipated. Kotlin conversion itself is complete (10 of 14 acceptance criteria pass, 1.21.4 fully validated end-to-end). 5 bugs flagged for Phase 2a-2 follow-up: Stonecutter chiseledBuild error, JDK 25 for 26.1.2, Loom 1.11 for 1.21.11, scope-reduced settings.gradle.kts, FLK version mismatch for 1.20.1.
